// A standalone no-report above `try` anchors to the try statement, which no
// catch rule consults - the catch still fires, and the message says where the
// marker belongs instead of ignoring it silently.
class MarkerAboveTry {
    void m() {
        // no-report: placed a line too early to count
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (Exception e) { // want "JV001.*above `try`"
            log(e);
        }
    }

    void risky() throws Exception {}

    void log(Exception e) {}
}
